import { SignatureFilled, ReadFilled, FileTextFilled, WechatFilled, FlagFilled, SunFilled, ToolFilled, } from "@ant-design/icons"; import casey from "../img/casey.JPG"; import journaling from "../img/journaling.jpg"; import leneLogo from "../img/lene-logo.jpg"; import taubenLogo from "../img/tauben-logo.jpeg"; export const AboutMeContainer = () => { return (

This page is for getting to know me better.

Here are some things I enjoy doing:

  •  Working with UX Design to solve problems
  •  Reading all kinds of books
  •  Journaling
  •  Get to know new people
  •  Playing Videogames
  •  Taking a walk with my dog
  •  Working on improving myself

Next to thhe hoobies from above I also vounteer at a local pigeon rescue network, where I help take care of injured or sick pigeons. I also volunteer in a garden where children can learn about nature and gardening. I find it very rewarding to be able to give back to the community. If you want to know more about them, please check out their website.

Pigeon Rescue Network: https://taubenrettunghannover.de/ Garden: https://lerngartennetzwerk-hannover.de/
); };
